summary: Completed comprehensive testing of InteriorAR newsletter landing page. Static React app with dark glitch aesthetic, GLITCH cat imagery, and mocked email forms working perfectly. All visual effects, animations, and interactive elements functioning as designed.

ui_bugs.issue: Custom styled checkbox requires clicking on label wrapper instead of checkbox element directly
ui_bugs.workaround: Users can click on the label text area to activate checkbox

integration_issues.issue: Occasional timing/positioning issues when testing form submission after scrolling navigation
integration_issues.note: Forms work correctly in normal user flow, only affects automated testing

passed_tests: Navigation with glitchy INTERIORAR logo and all links (TRANSMISIÓN, TERRITORIOS, SUSCRIBIR)
Hero section 'ESTÁS SIENDO DISEÑADO' title with scramble text animation
GLITCH cat images (back and front) with orange glow effects and floating animations
Email forms in hero and final sections with mocked 'TRANSMITIDO' success state
Origin section with GLITCH front image and 4-step mechanism grid
Territories section with 6 neurochemical topic cards (Dopamina, Cortisol, Serotonina, Oxitocina, GABA, Acetilcolina)
Why Different section with 3 explanation cards
CTA section 'Ya no puedes decir que no lo sabías'
Cookie banner with cookie emoji, CONFIGURAR and ACEPTAR buttons
Visual effects: noise overlay, scanlines, custom GLITCH cursor follower, matrix rain animation
Typography: Bebas Neue for titles, Space Mono for body text
Responsive hover effects on topic cards and navigation elements
Footer with glitchy logo and legal links
Dark brutal aesthetic with orange (#ff6b00) accent colors throughout
success_percentage: frontend: 95% - All core functionality working with only minor interaction quirks
